generated_oml:
instance LivingLabBuilding : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "Living Lab building in the AECO domain serving as the physical asset for the digital twin"
    base:contains OccupancySensor, LightingLevelSensor, LightingActuator, HVACController
]

instance OccupancySensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Sensors configured within BIM models to capture occupancy data for adaptive control systems in BOREALIS"
    DTDFVocab:producedData OccupancyDataTransmitted
]

instance LightingLevelSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Sensors configured within BIM models to capture lighting levels for adaptive control systems in BOREALIS"
    DTDFVocab:producedData LightingLevelDataTransmitted
]

instance LightingActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Actuator for adjusting lighting systems based on DT control signals"
]

instance HVACController : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Controller for HVAC systems executing DT-generated control signals"
]

instance OccupancyDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom OccupancySensor
]

instance LightingLevelDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom LightingLevelSensor
]

instance OccupancyData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time occupancy data stream from physical sensors"
    DTDFVocab:fromData OccupancyDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo EclipseHono, EclipseDitto
]

instance LightingLevelData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time lighting level data stream from physical sensors"
    DTDFVocab:fromData LightingLevelDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo EclipseHono, EclipseDitto
]

instance BIMGeometricModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Geometric BIM model representing the physical structure of the Living Lab building"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ModelDrivenEngineeringEnabler, UnrealEngine5
]

instance BIMSpatialModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Spatial BIM model for room and space relationships in the Living Lab building"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ModelDrivenEngineeringEnabler, UnrealEngine5
]

instance BIMFunctionalModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Functional BIM model detailing system operations and components in the Living Lab building"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ModelDrivenEngineeringEnabler, UnrealEngine5
]

instance EclipseHono : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Eclipse Hono for device connectivity and data ingestion from physical sensors"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeMonitoringService, EnergyOptimizationService, VisualComfortAdjustmentService
]

instance EclipseDitto : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Eclipse Ditto for digital twin management and state synchronization"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeMonitoringService, EnergyOptimizationService, VisualComfortAdjustmentService
]

instance UnrealEngine5 : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Unreal Engine 5 for interactive 3D visualization of the digital twin"
    DTDFVocab:enables Interactive3DVisualizationService
]

instance ModelDrivenEngineeringEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Model-Driven Engineering tools for automated model transformations and deployment"
    DTDFVocab:enables TwinningProcessService, SimulationService
]

instance RealTimeMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service for real-time monitoring of building operational conditions"
    DTDFVocab:provides OccupancyMonitoringInsight, LightingLevelMonitoringInsight
]

instance EnergyOptimizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service for predictive energy consumption optimization using analytics"
    DTDFVocab:provides EnergyConsumptionOptimizationInsight, AdjustHVACAction
]

instance VisualComfortAdjustmentService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service for adjusting visual comfort based on sensor data and analytics"
    DTDFVocab:provides VisualComfortAdjustmentInsight, AdjustLightingAction
]

instance NonVisualHealthEffectAnalysisService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service for analyzing non-visual health effects of lighting and environment"
    DTDFVocab:provides NonVisualHealthEffectImprovementInsight
]

instance Interactive3DVisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service for interactive 3D visualization using Unreal Engine 5"
    DTDFVocab:provides VisualizationInsight
]

instance SimulationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service for simulating building performance under various scenarios"
    DTDFVocab:provides SimulationInsight
]

instance TwinningProcessService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service for automated deployment and evolution of the digital twin using reinforcement learning"
    DTDFVocab:provides ModelDeploymentInsight, ControlPolicyOptimizationInsight
]

instance EnergyConsumptionOptimizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Predictive analytics for optimizing energy consumption in the Living Lab building"
]

instance VisualComfortAdjustmentInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight for adjusting visual comfort based on sensor data and occupancy"
]

instance NonVisualHealthEffectImprovementInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight for improving non-visual health effects through lighting and environmental adjustments"
]

instance VisualizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Interactive 3D visualization of building conditions for facility management"
]

instance SimulationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight from building performance simulations"
]

instance ModelDeploymentInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight related to model deployment from BIM to runtime artifacts"
]

instance ControlPolicyOptimizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight for iterative optimization of control policies using reinforcement learning"
]

instance OccupancyMonitoringInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time monitoring of occupancy patterns in the Living Lab building"
]

instance LightingLevelMonitoringInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time monitoring of lighting levels in the Living Lab building"
]

instance AdjustLightingAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automated adjustment of lighting levels based on visual comfort insights"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance AdjustHVACAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automated control of HVAC systems for energy optimization"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "Transmission of control signals (e.g., lighting adjustments, HVAC commands) from the DT to physical actuators via Eclipse Hono and Ditto for bidirectional communication."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "Real-time synchronization with continuous data exchange for live monitoring and control."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "A centralized framework orchestrating BIM models, Eclipse Hono/Ditto middleware for data exchange, Unreal Engine visualization, and modular service extensions for scalable DT operations."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "Design, construction, operation, and refurbishment phases; the DT primarily covers the 'as operated' phase through real-time operational data integration."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Evaluated using the Overall Digital Twin Entanglement (ODTE) metric to assess interoperability and architectural soundness between the DT and physical counterpart."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "Eclipse Hono and Ditto for real-time data exchange, facilitating bidirectional communication between physical assets and the DT."
]

instance horizontal_integration : DTDFVocab:HoriIntegration [
    base:desc "Standardized extension points for integrating with external systems (e.g., Building Management Systems, IoT platforms) through modular service-oriented architecture."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "BIM standards for AECO domain modeling and the ODTE metric for evaluation; Eclipse Hono and Ditto are middleware tools, not standards themselves."
]
